description.name: Seminyak Sunrise Bungalow
description.headline: Beachfront bungalow with direct ocean access in Seminyak
description.description: A serene one-bedroom bungalow set directly on Seminyak Beach, with its own private terrace just metres from the water. Traditional Balinese architecture — teak wood, open-air bathroom, and tropical garden — creates an authentic island retreat. Sunsets here are legendary.

reviews: Waking up to the sound of waves every morning was a dream. The bungalow is beautiful and the location unbeatable.
Perfect romantic escape. The sunset from the terrace is absolutely stunning. Very clean and comfortable.

policies.cancellation_policy: Free cancellation up to 7 days before check-in
